rules.reason: Formula milk is a highly processed specialist nutrition product.
Infant-milk formulations are manufactured specialist products.
Follow-on milk remains a specialist manufactured product.
Comfort milk is a specialised formula product.
Toddler milk is still a processed nutrition product.
Bar-format toddler snack is more processed than a simple puree or cereal.
Snack-bar format adds processing steps and concentration.
Puff snacks are processed finger foods.
Ring snacks are processed finger foods.
Crisp-style snack format is more processed.
Pouch-format foods are processed but often still ingredient-led.
Puree format can stay lightly processed when ingredients stay simple.
First-tastes products are usually built around very short ingredient lists.
Prepared baby meals tend to have longer, more processed ingredient lists.
Baby cereals are processed but often remain cereal-led rather than additive-led.
